global.description: The ad features a vibrant red background with bold text and decorative shapes.
global.main_message: Promoting exclusive content available for purchase.

elements.label: Red background
elements.description: A solid red background fills the canvas, providing a vibrant base for the other elements.

elements.label: Exclusive tonight
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Exclusive tonight' is prominently displayed at the top of the ad.

elements.label: New hits every week
elements.description: Smaller white text reading 'New hits every week' is centered below the headline.

elements.label: Shop now button
elements.description: A rectangular button with the text 'Shop now' in white, centered at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: PulsePlay logo
elements.description: A small logo labeled 'PulsePlay' appears in the top left corner of the ad.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small label reading 'UGC' is positioned just below the logo in the top left corner.

elements.label: Circular shape
elements.description: A light pink circular shape is placed in the center of the ad, adding a decorative touch.

elements.label: Oval shape
elements.description: An oval shape in a lighter shade of pink is positioned near the center, complementing the circular shape.

elements.label: Bottom area
elements.description: The bottom area of the ad is filled with a darker red shade, contrasting with the main content.

elements.label: Top text
elements.description: The top section contains the 'PulsePlay' logo and 'UGC' label, both in white against the red background.

elements.label: UGC text
elements.description: The 'UGC' label is small and positioned above the main content, indicating user-generated content.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, bold and modern, exclusive content, vibrant red background
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, followed by body text, with a CTA button at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Exclusive tonight, New hits every week, Shop now, PulsePlay, UGC
